title: Pogadhae Pogadhae Lyrics Damaal Dumeel Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Pogadhae Pogadhae
Singer(s): Remya Nambeesan
Lyricist: Thamarai
Movie: Damaal Dumeel
Music: Thaman S

Pogadhe pogadhe
nee ponaal endhan nenjam thaangaadhe.
Ennai nee, neengaadhe
nallathor veenai seidha pinbam
kollayil veesichella mundha.

Ennai nee pirindhu
sella sella sella sella
ennuyir parandhu sellumey

Pogadhe pogadhe
nee ponaal endhan nenjam thaangaadhe

Un thozhai thozhai unjal aakki
naanum saaindhu aadi aadi viluven
anbaale maraven.

En selai thannai porvaiyaakki
neeyum aalndhu thoonga thoonga tharuven
muththangal iduven.

Kaattrile ketkum osai ellaam
kadhile vandhu thaikkum ullam
vazhvile neeyum illai illai illai
endral naanum yen vazhavendum sol ?

Pogadhe pogadhe
nee ponaal endhan nenjam thaangaadhe

Hey naanum neeyum malai maattrum
malai mattrum soppanangal kalayum
sollaamal sidhayum.

Modhirangal vaangum podhu
muthu vaira karkkal karkkal udaiyum
mugoorththam thavarum.

Pogadhe pogadhe
nee ponaal endhan nenjam thaangaadhe
Andrilaai vazha naanum vandhen
annamaai .. thaaney thandhen
unnaiye enni enni enni vazhndha
vazhndha ennaiye marandhu ponadhen.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Pogadhae Pogadhae?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, highlighting the emotional turmoil of separation.

What is the plot context of the song in Damaal Dumeel?

This song plays during a pivotal moment in the movie, reflecting the protagonist's emotional struggles and romantic aspirations.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Ramya Nambeesan and composed by Thaman S.

When was Pogadhae Pogadhae released?

The song was released on February 27, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Pogadhae Pogadhae, the protagonist expresses heartfelt emotions of love and longing, beautifully encapsulated through Ramya Nambeesan's captivating voice. The song serves as a poignant reflection of the struggles faced in romantic relationships, making it relatable to many. With its soothing melody and evocative lyrics by Thamarai, it resonates deeply with listeners. This track not only enhances the narrative of Damaal Dumeel but also leaves a lasting impression of love's complexities.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Pogadhae Pogadhae from Damaal Dumeel is a mesmerizing romantic melody that captures the essence of longing and love. With Ramya Nambeesan's soulful vocals and Thaman S's enchanting music, this track is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Dive into the emotional depths of this beautiful song that resonates with anyone who's ever experienced love's bittersweet moments.
stanzaMeanings: Don't go, don't go, if you leave, my heart can't bear it. You, you have created a beautiful melody that blows in the wind.
You are leaving me, saying, saying, saying, my life is flying away, saying.
Don't go, don't go, if you leave, my heart can't bear it.
Your friend, friend, I will swing and dance, and I will forget everything in love.
I will make my path beautiful, and you will sleep peacefully, I will give you pearls.
The sounds that come in the wind, if they come to the heart, what should I do if you are not there in life?
Don't go, don't go, if you leave, my heart can't bear it.
Hey, you and I will not speak of dreams and will not mix them together.
When we gather jewels, pearls will shine, and the mistakes will be forgotten.
Don't go, don't go, if you leave, my heart can't bear it. I came to live like this, I gave you everything, and I forgot myself.
